hero.headline: Transforming Behavioral Insights
hero.subheadline: BehaviorIQ™ uses AI to identify conduct issues quickly and accurately, empowering parents and educators with actionable insights.
hero.supporting_text: Join thousands of parents and educators using AI to foster better behavior.

definition_section.heading: What is an AI Behavioral Assessment?
paragraphs: An AI behavioral assessment utilizes advanced algorithms to evaluate children's conduct issues, providing tailored insights and recommendations.
BehaviorIQ™ leverages data-driven methodologies to support children, parents, and educators in understanding and addressing behavioral challenges.

steps.title: Assessment
steps.description: Parents and educators complete a quick, guided assessment to identify behavioral concerns.

steps.title: Analysis
steps.description: BehaviorIQ™ analyzes the data using AI to uncover patterns and insights related to conduct issues.

steps.title: Actionable Insights
steps.description: Receive a comprehensive report with tailored strategies to support the child's behavioral development.

faq.question: Is my data safe with BehaviorIQ™?
faq.answer: Absolutely! We prioritize privacy and employ strict data protection measures.

faq.question: How accurate are the assessments?
faq.answer: Our assessments are clinically validated to ensure high accuracy and relevance.

faq.question: Can educators use this tool?
faq.answer: Yes, BehaviorIQ™ is designed for both parents and educators to enhance student support.
